steps.title: Identify the decisive signal
steps.content: The phrase “Bloom praises how the novel adroitly blends” ties Bloom's appreciation directly to a reason: the blending of modes.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: This gives a reason why the critic appreciates the book—which is what choice A describes. Choice B mistakenly refers to the text after the em dash (where the distinction is clarified), while C and D falsely invoke comparison or contrast. That matches choice A — A is correct.
